title: nephrodium semibipinnatum
intro: Nephrodium semibipinnatum, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Matoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Nephrodium semibipinnatum is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be found in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules.
